label: hate
rationale: 'Stupid luos' plus 'Mtapigwa hadi akili ikuje' - collective insult with violence threat.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' - collective negative characteristic attributed to entire ethnic community.

label: neither
rationale: Self-referential list using 'we the tribal kikuyu bigots' - appears satirical or self-critique.

label: hate
rationale: 'Watu wa nyanza... mbwa nyinyi' - dehumanising term 'dogs' directed at regional ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kikuyus... Ruto ndio Dawa yenu' - political mockery without collective contempt or harm.

label: offensive
rationale: 'akili zenu wote kama maiti' - insults aimed at named individuals/officials, not ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: Negative collective framing of Muslims' religious practices with 'Ni nguruwe tu hampendi.'

rationale: 'VERY USELESS GOVERNMENT' - harsh political criticism, no ethnic targeting.

rationale: 'RUTO MUST GET RID OF.. MURKOMEN DUALE' - political opinion about removing officials.

rationale: 'Kazi ya Wamunyoro ni fitina, ukabila na chuki' - collective negative characteristics.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kenya was liberate from grip of kikuyus' - frames entire community as oppressors.

label: hate
rationale: 'TRIBAL BIGOTS' directed at Kikuyus as a collective group with negative attribution.

label: hate
rationale: 'KALENJIN MAFIA' - collective negative criminal framing of ethnic community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kasongo ni masaibu tu' - individual politician criticism using nickname.

label: offensive
rationale: Self-critique by Luo author 'Luos tunakuanga very cheap politically' with unclear second target.

rationale: 'How kikuyus voted... portrays them as very greedy' - collective negative characteristic.

rationale: 'Luos will always want to be ahead of luhyas' - ethnic-bloc political rivalry observation.

rationale: 'punish Kikuyus by voting' - electoral action framed ethnically but via ballot box.

rationale: 'Kikuyus have singlehandedly made sure nothing good ever comes out of western' - collective blame.

rationale: 'A Kisii can't be President...waste of human resources' - declares community categorically unfit.

rationale: 'Kalenjins and Kikuyus cartels...alternating leadership' - describing political power patterns.
